top_signals.title: US weighs using Iranian assets to compensate Gulf allies for war damage
top_signals.summary: Proposal comes as relations between Trump administration and regional partners have been strained by conflict
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Air New Zealand Steps Up Flight Cuts as Fuel Costs Mount
top_signals.summary: Air New Zealand will cut more flights in the three months through October as it faces rising jet fuel costs and soft demand, particularly in its home market, Chief Executive Officer Nikhil Ravishankar said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A big week for two Big Tech businesses
top_signals.summary: SpaceX IPO launches, Apple to hit reset, Trump turns 80, Fifa World Cup 2026 kicks off
